title: B@`alyah #1183
definition:
Bealiah = "Jehovah is master"

 1) a Benjamite who went over to David at Ziklag and was one of David's
    mighty warriors
nasbUsage:
Definition: Bealiah = "Jehovah is master"

 1) a Benjamite who went over to David at Ziklag and was one of David's
    mighty warriors

    NASB:  Yah is lord, one of Davids heroes
